name: Biscotti Di Prato ( Tuscan Almond Biscotti)
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups Whole Blanched Almonds, toasted lightly and chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------EGG WASH----------------------------------
1 Egg, large; 1 tablespoon Water
In the bowl of an electric mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, blend together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until well combined. In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, yolks, vanilla, and almond extract. Add this mixture to the flour mixture, beating until a dough forms, then stir in the almonds.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead several times. Divide into fourths. Working on 2 large buttered and floured baking sheets, form each piece of dough into a flattish log (11 inches long and 2 inches wide). Arrange logs at least 3 inches apart on the sheets. Brush with egg wash.
Bake in a preheated oven to 350°F for 35 minutes. Let cool on sheets on racks for 10 minutes. On a cutting board, cut logs crosswise into 3/4-inch slices. Arrange biscotti cut sides down on baking sheets and bake 5-7 minutes per side, or until pale golden. Transfer to racks to cool; store in airtight containers. Makes about 56 biscuits.
